About

About Ebiya.sg

Two decades inside VISA and PayPal means we've seen every failure mode — and built the playbooks to fix them.

Our Story

Insider knowledge you can't hire for

Ebiya.sg was built on two decades of firsthand experience inside the payment networks that power Southeast Asia. We've sat in the rooms where routing decisions get made, compliance rules get written, and PSP deals get negotiated.

That institutional knowledge is what we bring to every client engagement. Not theory — actual playbooks from running payments at scale.

Airlines Hotels & OTAs E-commerce Marketplace Ticketing Tour Operators SaaS
VISA Alumni
PayPal Alumni
PCI-DSS
20+ Years
SEA Wallets
100+ Clients

Our Approach

Honest advice, measurable outcomes

No vendor bias

We recommend the PSP that's right for your business, not the one that pays the best referral fee.

Outcome-tied scope

Every engagement scope is written around measurable targets — acceptance rate, cost reduction, or market coverage.

Confidential by default

We don't name clients without permission. Your payment architecture is competitively sensitive — we treat it that way.

Fast start

No lengthy onboarding or workshops before we add value. The free assessment gives you real findings in under 15 minutes.

Get started today

Ready to fix your payment stack?

Start with a free, no-obligation assessment. Know exactly where you're losing revenue in 15 minutes.

Start Free Assessment Book a Call
